metadata.title: Yunus Emre Erkesikbaş — AI-Powered Portfolio
metadata.description: Personal portfolio of Yunus Emre Erkesikbaş — frontend developer with an AI assistant that knows my work.

landing.title: Yunus Emre Erkesikbaş — AI Portfolio Assistant & Developer Showcase
landing.description: Chat with an AI assistant that knows Yemre's full profile — projects, skills, experience, and open-source work. The fastest way to explore a developer portfolio.

home.title: Portfolio Overview — Yunus Emre Erkesikbaş
home.description: Explore Yunus Emre Erkesikbaş's professional background, featured projects, and tech expertise. Frontend developer specializing in SAP CX, Angular, and Next.js.

projects.title: Projects & Case Studies — Yunus Emre Erkesikbaş
projects.description: Delivered work by Yunus Emre Erkesikbaş — multi-tenant SaaS platforms, SAP Commerce storefronts, Angular dashboards, and Next.js applications.

contact.title: Contact — Yunus Emre Erkesikbaş
contact.description: Get in touch with Yunus Emre Erkesikbaş for frontend development, SAP CX consulting, or collaboration. Available for freelance from Istanbul, Turkey.

header.logoAriaLanding: Yunus Emre Erkesikbaş — AI assistant, yemredev.com
header.logoAriaApp: Yunus Emre Erkesikbaş — portfolio overview, yemredev.com

hero.title: Hi. I'm Yemre's AI Assistant.
hero.subtitle: Ask me about frontend development, Angular, Next.js, or Spring Boot — or let me walk you through Yemre's projects.

prompts.skills: What are Yemre's standout technical skills and differentiators?
prompts.experience: Give me the highlights of Yemre's career and professional experience.
prompts.resume: Where can I download Yemre's resume?
prompts.craftive: Explain the Craftive project (slug "craftive") from the Portfolio projects catalog only: what problem it solves, multi-tenant architecture, monorepo layout, main technologies, and where to try the live site or repo. Do not drift to unrelated products.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.rate_limited: Too many messages too quickly. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.provider_unavailable: The assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a minute.
errors.bad_request: That message couldn't be sent. Please rephrase and try again.
errors.server_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

contact.title: Contact
